title: FAAAAKE Interview with Eva 07 and pilot Kensuke
display_title: FAAAAKE Interview with Eva 07 and pilot Kensuke
wikitext:
[]: [FAAAAKE] Interview with Eva-07 and pilot Kensuke Post by Napul » Mon Nov 11, 2013 12:58 pm [URL=http://imgur.com/PegzyhI] [/URL] ?!?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:03 pm We need Numbers-kun, ASAP!!!

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:09 pm What does this have to do with Peaceful Times? Napul wrote: [URL=http://imgur.com/PegzyhI] [/URL] ?!?

[]: Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:22 pm Napul wrote: [URL=http://imgur.com/PegzyhI] [/URL] ?!?

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:51 pm Napul wrote: [URL=http://imgur.com/PegzyhI] [/URL] ?!?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:53 pm Reichu wrote: I honestly can't tell who the interview is supposed to be with (who is "K-san"?), but if it's genuine, it might be about unused Q story, if anything.

[]: Post by Fireball » Mon Nov 11, 2013 1:55 pm Kensuke finally getting his 15 minutes

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:02 pm ^ OK now I get it better, the haircut and color are very similar, it was the big number of freckles and the eye color that made me mistaken. Speaking of eyes, the redish eyes and big bulging veins screams of "Armisael" for me, did the 12th Angel made another victim before Mark.06?

[]: Post by Black Swordsman » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:02 pm Napul wrote: [URL=http://imgur.com/PegzyhI] [/URL] ?!?

[]: Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:06 pm ElMariachi wrote: Redish eyes

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:07 pm The image flipped horizontally, notices that the entry plug wall panels have a evamk7 label, so his Eva seems to have been Evangelion Mark.07 ... don't tell me SEELE gave to Kensuke a fucking ADAM ? [URL=http://minus.com/lwJ2n2Y2XJs16] [/URL] Crazy theory : he is the one who triggered the actual Third Impact!

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:07 pm ElMariachi wrote: Speaking of eyes, the redish eyes and big bulging veins screams of "Armisael" for me, did the 12th Angel made another victim before Mark.06?

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:13 pm ElMariachi wrote: @ Reichu : how do you know the pilot is Kensuke?

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:14 pm ^ Yeah, I didn't saw the likeness in the small image in the first picture, now with a bigger resolution, it's clear that it's Kensuke. As for the amateurish image, could be because it's still not finished, or because it's "just" a short movie that thus don't have the same quality of the main movies(yes, I'm an hopeless believer!) @ UrsusArctos : Well, you have to admit that if it's a fake, it's pretty well executed, few people would had taken the hassle to imprint two pages in magazine format just for a fake.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:22 pm ElMariachi wrote: As for the amateurish image, could be because it's still not finished, or because it's "just" a short movie that thus don't have the same quality of the main movies(yes, I'm an hopeless believer!)

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:30 pm ^ Eh, as I said, I'm an hopeless believer! More seriously, I just like to nitpick every details of any image I see, and it helps kill time until something concrete appears. It's genuine material? Good! It's a fake? Well tough luck, at least we could be impressed by the work the one behind the fake put behind it to make it as believable as possible. And the deliciously dark irony of having for once Kensuke officially piloting an Eva for it to end up horribly wrong is something I can picture Anno do, good fanfic fuel at least I guess!

[]: Post by hui43210 » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:35 pm Where did this even come from?

[]: Post by ApolloIVtv » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:49 pm Here's a Japanese thread or article thing that takes about it. [url]http://viptms.info/thread/24896[/url]

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 11, 2013 2:59 pm In the Japanese thread linked just above there are images of the magazine article... the same page with two different models of page, also notice that "EVA-07"'s prog-knife is absent in the upper-left image. : SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Nov 11, 2013 3:06 pm ElMariachi wrote: I think we can definitively say it's a fake.
